reviews.comment:
Me gustó,  muy buena estación de servicio con comedor y buenos descuentos para quienes son socios del ACA. Todo limpio y ordenado menos el sanitario de Damas. Buen restaurante y confiteria. La tienda full estaba muy surtida. Precios caros por lo que ofrecen

(Translated by Google)
I liked it; a very good service station with a dining area and good discounts for ACA members. Everything was clean and tidy except for the women's restroom. The restaurant and confectionery were good. The full-service store was very well-stocked. Prices are high for what they offer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdm9tNFdnEAE

reviews.comment:
SE DEMORA MUCHO, LA LIMIEZA DE LOS BAÑOS ES POR DEMAS MEDIOCRE EL MAS LIMPIA UNA LETRINA QUE ELLOS, EL OLOR ES INSOPORTABLE A DOS METROS DE INGRESAR A LOS MISMOS Y ESTO NO ES DE AHORA AÑOS VIAJANDO PARA LA CORDILLERA Y NINCA CAMBIO, EL SHOPING DE COMPRAS ES UN ASALTO AL BOLSILLO, NO TIENEN LA CARTELERIA DE LA APP DE YPF A LA VISTA, ES PREFERIBLE PASAR DE LARGO Y CARGAR MAS ADELANET EN CUALQUIR OTRA ESTACION!!!

(Translated by Google)
The wait is terrible, the cleanliness of the bathrooms is extremely poor—a latrine is cleaner than these! The smell is unbearable two meters from the entrance, and this isn't a recent problem; I've been traveling to the mountains for years and nothing has changed. The on-site shopping is a rip-off, and they don't even have the YPF app signage visible. It's better to just drive past and fill up later at any other station!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbXF2NWtRRRAB
